title: stelis auriculata
intro: Stelis auriculata, also known as golden orchid, is a type of orchid plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis auriculata include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce stress. Stelis auriculata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, allowing for various uses in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
